/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_App.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_Data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_Datatrans.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_Group.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_IOinfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_Parameter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/MPCNS_Pre_Split.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/Pre_ACANSOutput.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MAIN.dir/src/Pre_MPCNSOutput.cpp.o -o MAIN
